query:
-- Update monthlyRevenue for services that now have DataGate matched items but still show $0 revenue
UPDATE services s
SET s.monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT SUM(bi.lineAmount)
  FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
  AND bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
  AND bi.matchStatus = 'matched'
)
WHERE s.externalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT serviceExternalId FROM billing_items 
  WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate' AND matchStatus = 'matched' AND serviceExternalId != ''
)
AND (s.monthlyRevenue = 0 OR s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL);

-- Check the 5 remaining unmatched items
SELECT bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate' AND bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched';
